column1: # Coarse per-species genome-size table (approximate, in bp) used only as a
# fallback --gsize hint for the assembly stage when no reference genome was
# fetched for a sample (e.g. --skip_reference_genome_fetch, or a fetch that
# failed). When a reference IS available its actual length is used instead, and
# any species not listed here falls back to --default_genome_size.
# Values are deliberately ballpark (rounded to ~0.1 Mb): assembly quality is
# insensitive to genome size within ~2x - the hint only needs to keep Flye/
# Shovill's own coverage estimation in the right order of magnitude. Extend
# freely for local priority organisms; precision is not required.
# Keyed on NCBI species-level taxid (matches the species-ID consensus).
